texto: In the future, I kind of like the idea of doing music for film. I think that would be a nice job. I've always liked the sound aspect in movies. I guess once I have more instruments under my belt, it could be something I could do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Christopher Abbott: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “In the future, I kind of like the idea of doing music for film. I think that would be a nice job.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, future pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de future e job.
